attributes.Sql Query:
SEL
SIEURP.IAM_USER_ID,                  
SIEURP.ROLE_ID,                 
SIEURP.ROLE_NAME,                
SIEURP.TOOL_ID,               
SIEURP.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE,              
SIEURP.LVL_NUMBER,             
SIEURP.SITE_TARGET_ID,            
SIEURP.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,           
SIEURP.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG,          
SIEURP.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG,         
SIEURP.RESTRICTION_FLAG,        
SIEURP.PROXY_FLAG,       
SIEURP.GRANTOR_UNIVERSAL_ID,      
SIEURP.GRANTOR_CEC_ID,     
SIEURP.GRANTOR_CCO_ID,    
SIEURP.STATUS,   
SIEURP.TR_FLAG,  
SIEURP.LAST_ACTION, 
SIEURP.ERP_SEGMENT1,
SIEURP.IS_USER_SEL_PAR,
SIEURP.PDB_SITE_ID,
SIEURP.CREATED_BY,
SIEURP.CREATE_DATE,
SIEURP.UPDATED_BY,
SIEURP.UPDATE_DATE,
SIEURP.ACTION_CODE,
SIEURP.BATCH_ID,                     
SIEURP.CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE               
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_PTNRSITE SIEURP
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL IAC
ON (SIEURP.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
WHERE  SIEURP.SITE_TARGET_ID= NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT)
OR  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
WHERE SIEURP.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME )
OR  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
WHERE NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT=SIEURP.IAM_USER_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
WHERE SIEURP.TOOL_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT)

SEL
OUTPUT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
OUTPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
OUTPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
OUTPUT.IAM_USER_KEY,
OUTPUT.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
OUTPUT.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
OUTPUT.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
OUTPUT.DD_BK_PRTNR_SITE_PARTY_ID_INT,
OUTPUT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM,
OUTPUT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
OUTPUT.DD_CEC_ID,
OUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_USER,
OUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
OUTPUT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
OUTPUT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
OUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
OUTPUT.DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SEL
DT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
DT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
DT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
DT.IAM_USER_KEY,
DT.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
DT.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
DT.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
DT.DD_BK_PRTNR_SITE_PARTY_ID_INT,
DT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM,
DT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
DT.DD_CEC_ID,
DT.EDW_CREATE_USER,
DT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
DT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
DT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
DT.ACTION_CODE,
DT.DML_TYPE,
DT.UPDATE_DATE
FROM
(
SEL
NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
SIEURP.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
SIEURP.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
SIEURP.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
SIEURP.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT AS DD_BK_PRTNR_SITE_PARTY_ID_INT,
SIEURP.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM,
NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS DD_CEC_ID,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
CASE WHEN SIEURP.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
 WHEN  SIEURP.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' END  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
 'I'	ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NIPHL.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL AND
NIPHL.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IS NOT NULL AND
NIPHL.IAM_USER_KEY IS NOT NULL AND
NIPHL.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY IS NOT NULL
 THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END DML_TYPE,
 SIEURP.UPDATE_DATE

FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_PTNRSITE SIEURP
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (SIEURP.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
ON SIEURP.SITE_TARGET_ID= NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON SIEURP.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT=SIEURP.IAM_USER_ID 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON SIEURP.TOOL_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PTNRS_HIER_LNK NIPHL
ON(
NIPHL.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY  AND
NIPHL.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = SIEURP.ROLE_NAME AND
NIPHL.IAM_USER_KEY = NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AND
NIPHL.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY)

UNION ALL

SEL
NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
EIEURP.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
EIEURP.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
EIEURP.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
EIEURP.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT AS DD_BK_PRTNR_SITE_PARTY_ID_INT,
EIEURP.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM,
NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS DD_CEC_ID,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
CASE WHEN  EIEURP.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
 WHEN EIEURP.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' END  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
 'I'	ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NIPHL.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL AND
NIPHL.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IS NOT NULL AND
NIPHL.IAM_USER_KEY IS NOT NULL AND
NIPHL.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY IS NOT NULL
 THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END DML_TYPE,
 EIEURP.UPDATE_DATE

FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_PTNRSITE EIEURP
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL IAC
ON (EIEURP.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
ON EIEURP.SITE_TARGET_ID= NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON EIEURP.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT=EIEURP.IAM_USER_ID 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON EIEURP.TOOL_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PTNRS_HIER_LNK NIPHL
ON(
NIPHL.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY AND
NIPHL.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = EIEURP.ROLE_NAME AND
NIPHL.IAM_USER_KEY = NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AND
NIPHL.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY)
)DT
)OUTPUT 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY OUTPUT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
OUTPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,OUTPUT.IAM_USER_KEY,OUTPUT.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY ORDER BY OUTPUT.UPDATE_DATE DESC) = 1
